legal.title: Privacy & Legal
legal.subtitle: This page outlines our privacy practices, cookie usage, and terms of service. Questions? Reach us at

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.intro: {{brandName}} respects your privacy. This Privacy Policy explains how we collect, use, and protect information when you use {{website}}.

summary.title: Summary
summary.text: We collect the minimum needed to respond to you and improve the site. We do not sell personal data.

collect.title: Information we collect
collect.item1: Contact details you submit through forms (name, phone number, email, message).
collect.item2: Consultation booking details such as preferred date/time and project notes.
collect.item3: Basic analytics data (page views, device/browser type) used to improve the website.

use.title: How we use your information
use.item1: To respond to inquiries and confirm consultations.
use.item2: To improve our services, content, and website experience.
use.item3: To prevent abuse, ensure security, and maintain website integrity.

sharing.title: Sharing of information
sharing.text: We do not sell your personal data. We may share information with trusted service providers (hosting, analytics) only to operate our website. These providers are expected to protect your data.

retention.title: Data retention
retention.text: We retain submitted information only as long as needed to fulfill the purpose (follow-up and consultation coordination), unless a longer period is required for legal or operational reasons.

rights.title: Your rights
rights.text: You may request access, correction, or deletion of your submitted information by contacting us at

cookies.title: Cookie Policy
cookies.intro: Cookies are small files stored on your device that help websites function and improve user experience.

use.title: How we use cookies
use.item1: Essential cookies needed for core website functionality (where applicable).
use.item2: Analytics cookies to understand website performance and improve content.

manage.title: Managing cookies
manage.text: You can control cookies through your browser settings. Disabling cookies may impact certain website features.

terms.title: Terms of Service
terms.intro: By using this website, you agree to these Terms of Service. If you do not agree, please discontinue use.

content.title: Use of website content
content.item1: Our portfolio, images, and text content are provided for informational purposes and brand presentation.
content.item2: You may not copy, reproduce, or distribute website content without written permission.

consultation.title: Consultation requests
consultation.text: Submitting a consultation request does not guarantee availability. We will confirm your appointment via your preferred contact method.

links.title: External links
links.text: Our website may include links to third-party websites (e.g., WhatsApp). We are not responsible for third-party content or policies.

disclaimer.title: Disclaimer
disclaimer.text1: Website content is provided "as is" and may be updated at any time. While we aim for accuracy, we do not guarantee that all information is complete or current at all times.
disclaimer.text2: Project visuals, renders, or examples are illustrative. Final results may vary based on site conditions, material availability, and client approvals.

contactSection.title: Contact
contactSection.text: If you have questions about these policies, contact us at

notFound.title: Page Not Found
notFound.subtitle: The page you're looking for doesn't exist or may have been moved.

card_1.title: Free Consultation
card_1.description: Visit our office and discuss your needs with our engineers as a clear first step toward your project.

card_2.title: Design
card_2.description: We develop a complete plan that connects space distribution, details, and the overall character of the project.

card_3.title: Execution
card_3.description: We turn the design into reality with precise supervision and high quality until the project is completed.

card_4.title: Furnishing
card_4.description: We carefully coordinate furniture and pieces to complete the project with an elegant and balanced style.

hero.title_2: With a Design That Reflects Your Taste
hero.subtitle: From concept to execution, Into Art delivers interior design solutions that reflect your lifestyle, with a touch that combines luxury, practicality, and attention to detail.

who.desc: Into Art is an interior design and décor installation company. We create exclusive, distinctive designs through a well-studied engineering approach to space planning that serves our clients and gives them a sense of comfort and belonging in their homes or workplaces.

procedure.title: Our Process
procedure.desc: Clear, well-planned steps that give you an organized and reassuring experience from start to project completion.

1.title: Consultation
1.desc: We begin with a consultation session to understand your needs, style, and the nature of the space, with the goal of building a clear vision that matches your aspirations from the start.

2.title: Design Contract
2.desc: After defining the scope of work and agreeing on the requirements, the design contract is signed so the project can begin within a clear and organized framework.

3.title: Site Measurements
3.desc: We visit the site and take precise measurements to ensure that every stage of the work is based on accurate and approved data.

4.title: Design
4.desc: We prepare plans, concepts, and suitable details to arrive at a balanced design that combines beauty and function.

5.title: Pricing and Quantity Survey
5.desc: We prepare the quotation, quantities, and required materials with accuracy, giving you a clearer picture of the cost and helping organize execution efficiently.

6.title: Execution
6.desc: Execution begins according to the approved plans, with close attention to detail to ensure finishing quality and precision at every stage.

7.title: Project Handover
7.desc: Once the work is complete, the project is handed over in a refined final form, meeting the required quality and the result worthy of your expectations.

featured.title: Featured Works
featured.desc: A selected collection of our latest residential works.

1.title: Living Room for a Modern Apartment
Design That Reflects Your Lifestyle
1.desc: We transform your needs and ideas into a well-considered space that combines luxury, comfort, and functionality, serving you every day and clearly expressing your personality.

2.title: An Organized and Clear Journey
2.desc: We follow a structured process and communicate clearly at every stage, so the picture stays clear and the project experience feels smoother and more reassuring.

3.title: Execution Worthy of the Details
3.desc: We give great care to finishing and execution because we believe the quality of the final result is reflected in the precision and harmony of the details.

reviews.title: Client Testimonials
reviews.desc: Real words from homeowners we have worked with.

1.name: Client A
1.text: The work was very organized. Clear steps, excellent finishing, and quick response.

2.name: Client B
2.text: They understood our taste quickly and executed exactly what we wanted.

3.name: Client C
3.text: A professional team, a clear schedule, and excellent material recommendations.

4.name: Client D
4.text: High attention to detail and smooth communication throughout all stages.

5.name: Client E
5.text: The timing was clear, the material selection was luxurious, and the final result was perfect.

hero.title_1: Frequently Asked Questions and Clear Answers
hero.subtitle: Clear answers about process, timeline, pricing, and execution — so you know exactly what to expect.

empty.title: No Results
empty.desc: Try a different category or another keyword.

1.q: How do I book a consultation?
1.a: You can book directly through the consultation page on the website. After submission, our team will contact you to confirm the appointment and guide you through the next steps.

2.a: After the consultation, we review your requirements and prepare the design direction and proposal. Once approved, we move to the contract and execution planning stage.

3.q: Do you provide a quotation or bill of quantities?
3.a: Yes. Depending on the project scope, we provide an organized quotation with clear material items and execution scope.

4.q: Can I choose materials according to my budget?
4.a: Yes. We usually offer options at different levels and recommend the best balance between quality and cost for residential projects.

5.q: Do you handle execution or design only?
5.a: We can offer both. Many residential clients prefer a full delivery model (design + execution) with supervision to ensure quality and finishing.

6.a: A specialized engineer supervises execution, follows progress, and ensures that finishing quality matches the approved design.

7.q: How long does a residential project take?
7.a: That depends on the size and scope. After consultation and scope confirmation, we provide an estimated timeline with the main phases.

8.q: Can you execute a style I saw online?
8.a: Yes. Share your references with us and we will adapt the style to suit your space, lighting, and practical needs.

hero.title_1: A Residential Interior Design Team Built on
hero.subtitle: We offer a complete interior design experience that begins with a clear vision and ends with professional execution that translates the concept into reality.

whoWeAre.title: About Us
whoWeAre.text1: Into Art is a Kuwaiti company specializing in residential interior design and execution. We strive to create refined and practical spaces that align with your lifestyle.
whoWeAre.text2: Our delivery model combines local presence in Kuwait with expanded production and support capabilities through a partner team in Egypt — enabling efficient planning and consistent design output.

bullets.1: Residential interior design: villas, apartments, and private spaces
bullets.2: Concept design, space planning, and material selection
bullets.3: Execution supervision and premium finishing quality

note.title: Best Fit for Us
note.text: Clients who value precise planning, refined finishing, and a calm experience from start to finish.

values.title: Our Values
values.desc: The internal standards we apply in every project — from the first meeting to final handover.

1.title: Design with Purpose
1.desc: We prioritize comfort, flow, and long-term durability — not just aesthetics.

2.title: Execution That Matches the Design
2.desc: We focus on details, finishing, and on-site supervision to achieve the final look.

3.title: Clear Communication
3.desc: Organized steps, timely updates, and transparent decisions.

process.title: How We Work
process.desc: Clear steps that keep the experience professional and the results consistent.

1.title: Consultation
1.desc: We understand your needs, taste, timeline, and space requirements.

2.title: Concept and Proposal
2.desc: We translate ideas into a clear concept and defined direction.

3.title: Contract and Planning
3.desc: We define the scope, timeline, and deliverables before execution begins.

4.title: Execution
4.desc: Our team coordinates site work and monitors quality throughout the project.

5.title: Handover
5.desc: Final inspection, finishing touches, and a smooth handover experience.

callout.title: The Result You Should Expect
callout.text: A luxurious result that matches the approved design — with an organized plan, controlled execution, and a clean handover.

cta.title: Let's Design Your Space the Right Way
cta.desc: Book a consultation and we will guide you through the next steps based on your taste, project scope, and timeline.

story.title: It Began with the Belief That Details Make the Difference
story.body1: Into Art was founded with a vision built on the belief that the quality of any space begins with the quality of thinking behind it, and that details are what make the real difference in the quality of the place and the feeling it creates within. From the start, our direction was to offer a complete design experience that pays attention to detail and balances practical beauty with organized execution, reaching a result with real value and a cohesive identity. This direction remains at the core of who we are today.
story.body2: Over the years, we have developed a working style that combines clear design vision with organized execution, delivering a more balanced and transparent experience at every stage, while always preserving the personal character and attention to detail that give each project its own distinction.
story.quote: A place is not measured only by what you see, but by what you feel inside it.

mission.label: Mission
mission.title: Spaces That Work and Last
mission.desc: To deliver residential interior designs that combine precise design thinking with reliable execution — creating environments that continue serving their users long after handover.

vision.label: Vision
vision.title: The Standard in Residential Interior Design in Kuwait
vision.desc: To become the most trusted residential interior design company in Kuwait — known for organized delivery, refined aesthetics, and the confidence we give every client throughout their project.

philosophy.title: Design Philosophy
philosophy.desc: The principles that guide every decision we make — from the first sketch to final handover.

1.title: Function Before Form
1.desc: Every planning decision starts with how the space will be used. Aesthetics come after a layout that truly works.

2.title: Materials with Meaning
2.desc: We choose materials based on durability, tactile quality, and how they age — not just visual impact.

3.title: Detail at Every Level
3.desc: From ceiling heights to hardware finishes, we control quality at every level of execution.

different.title: What Makes Us Different
different.desc: The qualities that define how we work — and why clients return to us.

1.title: Exclusive Focus on Residential
1.desc: We do not divide our attention between commercial and residential work. Every decision is calibrated around how people live.

2.title: Design and Execution Under One Team
2.desc: No delivery gaps. The team that designs is the team that supervises — keeping the intent and the outcome aligned.

3.title: An Organized Client Process
3.desc: Every client gets a defined timeline, clear checkpoints, and consistent communication — from the first meeting to handover.

4.title: Based in Kuwait, Ready for Projects
4.desc: We work locally, know the market, and maintain a production network that supports fast and reliable execution.

5.title: Post-Handover Support
5.desc: We do not disappear after handover. We remain available for questions, adjustments, and follow-up.

6.title: Honest Scope Management
6.desc: We set realistic budgets and timelines upfront — no hidden surprises in the middle of the project.

hero.title: Let's Plan Your Interior Project the Right Way
hero.subtitle: Share a few details with us and we will confirm your consultation with the right specialist. This is the fastest way to get clear guidance for your space.
